text: I feel a sense of curious anticipation. The world here is polished and modern, brimming with innovation and promise. Through the glass, I sense a quiet invitation to ponder the interplay between humans and technology. The vibrant R+D wall whispers of the ceaseless drive to discover and invent. There is energy here, but also a certain distance—like I am on the verge of insight, peering into the very engine of human progress. I am both participant and observer, caught up in the hum of ideas and the calm before dialogue or creation.
